name: USA
style_of_play: High-energy pressing with direct vertical runs and emphasis on athleticism in wide areas.
weaknesses: can struggle against elite technical midfields
tactical_summary: Press in a mid-block that shifts to high intensity in triggers near the touchline; attack with direct balls to wingers and overlapping fullbacks. Midfield works to win second balls quickly.
why_it_matters: As a 2026 host, the USA benefits from crowd momentum and a system built around energy and disruption.
injury_news: Placeholder — domestic and international squad news to be integrated later.
